programme.desc: Sherlock Holmes and Dr Watson send Lord Henry Blackwood, a serial killer, to the gallows. However, they are shocked to learn that he is back from the dead and pursue him again.

programme.title: Constantine
programme.desc: Detective Angela approaches Constantine, an exorcist, to help her investigate her twin sister's death. As he digs deeper, he realises a dark conspiracy which could threaten the world.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible II
programme.desc: Agent Ethan Hunt fights against a rogue terrorist and rushes to prevent a deadly virus from spreading. To avert a global catastrophe, Ethan has to bring everything to an end.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: When Sam Witwicky buys a car, he unwittingly involves himself in a clash between Autobots and Decepticons over a device that can create life.

programme.title: Spider-Man
programme.desc: Peter Parker's life changes when he is bitten by a genetically altered spider and gains superpowers. He uses his powers to help people and finds himself facing the Green Goblin, an evil maniac.

programme.title: Justice League
programme.desc: Steppenwolf and his Parademons return after aeons to destroy Earth. However, Batman seeks the help of Wonder Woman to recruit The Flash, Cyborg and Aquaman to fight their new powerful enemy.

programme.title: The Lost City
programme.desc: Loretta Sage, a novelist, faces real-life peril when abducted by a billionaire.

programme.title: A Haunting
programme.desc: A chef and his wife find the perfect location for their restaurant in a cozy waterfront town, but the spirits haunting the Victorian mansion have other plans; soon, eerie and unexplained events threaten to force the couple out of business.

programme.title: A Haunting

programme.title: A Haunting

programme.title: A Haunting
programme.desc: Childhood sweethearts reconnect, but their happily-ever-after is threatened by dangerous poltergeist activity in their new home; when they find cryptic messages written on the bathroom mirror, the couple reach out to a renowned demonologist.

programme.title: A Haunting
programme.desc: A lifelong haunted house enthusiast purchases an old hospital to build a Halloween attraction; as staff members prepare for the grand opening, they experience a series of paranormal events suggesting that the location really is haunted.

programme.desc: Deeks goes under cover to find information on a notorious arms dealer trying to get back in the business.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A rape investigation leads to one of Detective Benson's old cases being reopened; as Benson's work is scrutinized, her relationship with Executive ADA David Haden is put in jeopardy.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A vigilante group forms in response to a string of rapes; concerns over his wife's fidelity distract Amaro.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: When the investigation into a missing teen leads the detectives to a severed leg, they are drawn into the world of self-mutilation and ritual amputation.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: As the detectives investigate reports of sexual abuse at an elite private school, decades of secrets are exposed.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: When a janitor violently attacks a coach, the SVU team connects the janitor's behavior to a history of sexual abuse; the detectives find more victims of the same predator -- including a prisoner (Mike Tyson) on death row.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A woman claims that Brian Cassidy (Dean Winters) raped her while he was working undercover; when Cassidy and his lawyer utilize surprising defense methods, Detective Amaro is affected.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: When Officer Michael Groves ends up in a psych ward after leveling accusations at the 12th Precinct, Internal Affairs asks the team to help investigate.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Investigation into the suspected rape of a woman Benson helped earlier leads to a cybermogul; the team bids farewell to Sgt. Munch.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: ADA Barba finds that a friend (Kirk Acevedo) -- with a connection to a mayoral candidate frontrunner -- is accused of rape.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A 4-year-old student makes claims of sexual abuse against a singing coach and popular TV personality (Billy Porter).

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A military officer who was gang raped refuses to cooperate with the SVU for fear of damage to her reputation; Amaro asks his ex to help dig up information on the case.

programme.title: Training Day
programme.desc: Police drama about a veteran officer who escorts a rookie on his first day with the LAPD's tough inner-city narcotics unit. "Training Day" is a blistering action drama that asks the audience to decide what is necessary, what is heroic and what crosses the line in the harrowing gray zone of fighting urban crime. programme.title: SEINDAH CINTA MUTIARA 43
programme.desc: It tells the story of Mutiara, who must struggle hard in order to live a decent life. Fortunately, there is Diandra, a friend who never stops supporting Mutiara and encouraging her to keep going.

programme.title: RAHASIA DAN CINTA 22

Thus begins the journey of Dwita, Greg, and Debu, as various problems start to arise in Dwita's life.
